speaker_2: 承知しました。リリースに向けて、私、山田が7月5日までにリリースノートのドラフトを作成します。

intermediates.en: Speaker 1: Let’s start with our Q3 project meeting today at Ebisu Office and remotely. The release date for new features has been officially set to July 13th. I, Yamada, will prepare a draft of the release notes by July 5th. Speaker 1, please proceed. Next, Mr. Tanaka should complete load testing by July 8th. The goal is to achieve simultaneous connections of 1,200 users with response time within 1.5 seconds. Speaker 2: Are you sure that we’re using the staging environment for load testing? Speaker 1: Please use the High Staging environment. Also, regarding budget, we will officially approve up to ¥30,000 per month for additional server costs. Thank you very much, speaker. My name is John Kim from Marketing. Would it be okay if we schedule press release delivery at 10 a.m. on the day of the launch? Speaker 1: Yes, that's settled then. John, please finalize the draft of the press release by July 10th. Speaker 3: Understood. Could Mr. Sato handle the next customer demo as well? Speaker 1: Mr. Sato, please prepare the demonstration materials. That concludes our discussion for today. The meeting is now adjourned.
